properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In this world full of trials, sometimes I want to give up Disappointments everywhere to weaken down my faith Life is not that easy, but life must go on Because I know that God is always with me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Weariness arise, but I have to be strong To face all the trials tomorrow may bring I will never lose hope, God knows everything I don't have to worry because I know, God is watching over me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus said, "My child, I know you can I'm just molding you to make you stronger Hold on with your prayer, I'm here for you I will stay beside you 'til the end of time".

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Instead of asking questions, why my life goes this way? I'd rather thank the Lord for giving these to me Sometimes I feel down but I have my forgiving God Thank you Lord for the wisdom, now I understand.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will stay beside you 'til the end of time
